title: dituilis nepalensis
intro: Dituilis nepalensis, also known as Himalayan yew or Himalayan araliya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. The medicinal properties of Dituilis nepalensis have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Dituilis nepalensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
